LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS COMPLAINANT TAQUERIA LA CUMBRE, INC. MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING RE-NOTICED IF TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED. PREJUDICE TO RECENTLY ADDED CROSS-DEFENDANTS DUE TO CURRENT TRIAL DATE, AND LACK OF TIME TO COMPLETE DISCOVERY AND FILE RESPONSIVE PLEADINGS. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. Ntc And Motion In Support Of X-Complainant'S Leave To File A First Amended X-Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS COMPLAINANT TAQUERIA LA CUMBRE, INC. Motion for Order granting Leave to File a First Amended Cross-Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for leave to file a first amended cross-complaint is denied without prejudice to being re-noticed if trial date is continued. Prejudice to recently added cross-defendants due to current trial date, and lack of time to complete discovery and file responsive pleadings. Request for sanctions denied. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbbine, CSR #5797

Ntc And Motion In Support Of X-Complainant'S Leave To File A First Amended X-Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Continued To Feb-19-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: CROSS COMPLAINANT TAQUERIA LA CUMBRE, INC. Motion in Support of Cross-Complainant's Leave to File a First Amended Cross-Complaint. Eve Marie Jacklin, Esq. Attorney at Law, (650) 208-1373 appearing for cross-complainant Taqueria LaCumbre, Inc. The court vacates its tentative ruling and rules that the matter is continued to February 19, 2010 for hearing. Additional documents (declarations) to be filed by Taqueria La Cumbre, Inc.; opposition to those documents to be filed by noon 2/18/2010. Counsel to give notice to opposing counsel of the continuance date along with new documents filed. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Bob Balian, CRS #5220
